description: Create a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow named Test: fingerprint that runs on a cron schedule from Monday to Friday at 21:00, on pull requests to the master branch, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest job matrix to test in debug and release modes, with four parallel splits. For each job, check out two repositories, set up a ccache directory, restore ccache from a previous run if available, install required packages, build and test the code using scripts, and run fingerprint tests with a specific configuration.
